title: Nowothing's Fudge
description: Vanilla+ kitchen sink focused on consistency and balancing.
body:
# Introduction
A modpack I've been working on for over a year now. Started out as a "Dang, no good modpacks around, guess I gotta make my own", went to a friend group kitchen sink and turned into a full brown project.

My focus in this project is, as lackluster as it sounds, to improve the immersion and aesthetic of the game, though adding more content is always one of my priorities, consistency and balancing always come as the first considerations.

## Features
- Beautiful terrain generation and biomes, combination of [Lithosphere](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lithosphere), [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) and [Geophilic]([https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic)).
- Amplified Nether terrain generation by, believe it or not, [Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amplified-nether).
- New animations for most entities as well as the player, courtesy of [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player).
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and addons, because of course.
- Rebalanced smithing by [Tinkerer's Smithing](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkerers-smithing).
- Progressively stronger enemies as time goes on and the deeper you go thanks to [Scaling Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/scaling-mobs).
- Awesome minor visual effects for many things, provided by [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects) and [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular).
- Optimization shenanigans thanks to various optimization and compatibility mods.
- More minor mods such as [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated), [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons), [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port)) and [Antique Atlas](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4).
- Of course, a lot more content that I either don't remember or just won't list here.

### Planned features
- Integration of vanilla recipes with mods such as Create (I gotta learn KubeJS...).
- Integration of Regions Unexplored with Spelunkery (also KubeJS).

### Usage rights
You may do the following to this project:
- Produce content/entertainment over it (YouTube videos, streaming).
- Modify it however you want, as long as you keep credit to the original project and don't monetize over it in any way other than previously mentioned (content/entertainment).
- Of course, use it as inspiration for any other project.

### Side notes
This project will probably never have consistent updates, but I'll be working on it when I have the motivation.

Modpack icon can be found here: https://www.tumblr.com/shittyjunedaily/688315168083656704/
